body.string: {"_meta":{"href":"https://test.demo.uol.cz/api/v1/predefined_texts","pagination":{"first":"https://test.demo.uol.cz/api/v1/predefined_texts?page=1\u0026per_page=250","last":"https://test.demo.uol.cz/api/v1/predefined_texts?page=1\u0026per_page=250"}},"items":[{"_meta":{"href":"https://test.demo.uol.cz/api/v1/predefined_texts/11134"},"creator":{"user_id":"uoladm"},"created_at":"2012-01-04T11:26:28+01:00","modifier":{"user_id":"uoladm"},"updated_at":"2013-01-29T10:58:43+01:00","status":"valid","external_id":null,"private":false,"text":"Plnění podléhá přenesené daňové povinnosti, dle §92a odst. 2 je výši daně povinen doplnit a přiznat plátce, pro kterého je plnění uskutečněno. Daň odvede zákazník.","predefined_text_id":11134},{"_meta":{"href":"https://test.demo.uol.cz/api/v1/predefined_texts/11182"},"creator":{"user_id":"uoladm"},"created_at":"2012-02-10T14:41:24+01:00","modifier":{"user_id":"uoladm"},"updated_at":"2013-01-29T11:03:11+01:00","status":"valid","external_id":null,"private":false,"text":"Podle ust. § 9 odst. 1 zákona č. 235/2004 Sb., je místo plnění na území státu příjemce plnění. Daň odvede zákazník, kterému je služba poskytována (čl. 196 Směrnice Rady 2006/112/ES, 2008/8/ES).","predefined_text_id":11182},{"_meta":{"href":"https://test.demo.uol.cz/api/v1/predefined_texts/67164"},"creator":{"user_id":"uoladm"},"created_at":"2015-02-02T10:08:38+01:00","modifier":{"user_id":"uoladm"},"updated_at":"2015-02-02T10:08:38+01:00","status":"valid","external_id":null,"private":false,"text":"The place of supply of services is in the country of the person to whom the services are supplied (Article 44 of Council Directive 2008/8/ES). VAT shall be payable by the person to whom the services are supplied (Article 196 of Council Directive 2006/112/EC, 2008/8/ES). Daň odvede zákazník.","predefined_text_id":67164},{"_meta":{"href":"https://test.demo.uol.cz/api/v1/predefined_texts/67166"},"creator":{"user_id":"uoladm"},"created_at":"2015-02-02T10:17:14+01:00","modifier":{"user_id":"uoladm"},"updated_at":"2015-02-02T10:17:14+01:00","status":"valid","external_id":null,"private":false,"text":"The supply of goods is free of Czech VAT (Article 146 of Council Directive 2006/112/EC).","predefined_text_id":67166},{"_meta":{"href":"https://test.demo.uol.cz/api/v1/predefined_texts/67167"},"creator":{"user_id":"uoladm"},"created_at":"2015-02-02T10:19:39+01:00","modifier":{"user_id":"uoladm"},"updated_at":"2015-02-02T10:19:39+01:00","status":"valid","external_id":null,"private":false,"text":"The supply of goods is free of Czech VAT (Article 138 of Council Directive 2006/112/EC). VAT shall be payable by the person to whom the goods are supplied (Article 200 of Council Directive 2006/112/EC, 2008/8/ES). Daň odvede zákazník.","predefined_text_id":67167}]}
